_comment: Starter architecture-fitness ruleset for the gui quick-start family (grm-quick-start-template, #314). Desktop/GUI shape: ui/ (views/components) talks to state/ (view-models/store), which talks to domain/ (core logic) — the view layer never reaches persistence directly. Adapt the layer globs to the project's real module layout. To decline enforcement entirely, replace this file's contents with { "schema-version": 1, "opt_out": true, "opt_out-reason": "..." } — grm-architecture-audit surfaces that decision explicitly instead of silently passing. Design: docs/grimoire/design/architecture-fitness-design.md §Scaffold defaults.

required-file-content.message: Cargo.toml should set [profile.dev] debug = "line-tables-only" — shrinks target/debug while keeping backtrace-quality debug info (#447)
